creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #9)
> Alternatively, try https://github.com/elFarto/nvidia-vaapi-driver/pull/220

Now part of multimedia/libva-nvidia-driver but runtime is still untested. Anything that uses it requires running via nv-sglrun to access NVDEC backend in nvidia-vaapi-driver.
